title: Demo: choose the next loop step
summary: Synthetic answered ask linked to a demo artifact for fixture coverage.
prompt: What should the demo loop optimize for next?
whyNow: The fixture should show how an artifact-backed ask records a bounded answer.
ifIgnored: The fixture remains in an unresolved state.

options.label: Keep the current loop
options.description: Continue with asks, artifacts, and notification policy.

options.label: Tighten the surface first
options.description: Polish the ask and artifact experience before adding channels.

options.label: Change the interaction
options.description: Keep the goal but revise the interaction model.
